name: What is the single most important AEO best practice to focus on right now?
description: Make the answer unmistakably clear and easy to extract. Direct wording, strong structure, and visible proof are the foundation of effective AEO.

mainEntity.name: What is the single most important AEO best practice to focus on right now?

acceptedAnswer.text: The most effective AEO pages usually combine clear answers, visible structure, and trust signals such as author info, citations, and original insight. If you only do one thing, focus on making your answer unambiguous and easy to extract, because that is the foundation of everything else.
acceptedAnswer.description: Make the answer unmistakably clear and easy to extract. Direct wording, strong structure, and visible proof are the foundation of effective AEO.
